films.title: City Lights
films.overview: A tramp falls in love with a beautiful blind flower girl. His on-and-off friendship with a wealthy man allows him to be the girl's benefactor and suitor.

films.title: The Great Dictator
films.overview: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.
films.character: Adenoid Hynkel, Dictator of Tomania / A Jewish Barber

films.title: The Gold Rush
films.overview: A gold prospector in Alaska struggles to survive the elements and win the heart of a dance hall girl.

films.title: Modern Times
films.overview: A bumbling tramp desires to build a home with a young woman, yet is thwarted time and time again by his lack of experience and habit of being in the wrong place at the wrong time..

films.title: The Kid
films.overview: A tramp cares for a boy after he's abandoned as a newborn by his mother. Later the mother has a change of heart and aches to be reunited with her son.

films.title: Monsieur Verdoux
films.overview: The film is about an unemployed banker, Henri Verdoux, and his sociopathic methods of attaining income. While being both loyal and competent in his work, Verdoux has been laid-off. To make money for his wife and child, he marries wealthy widows and then murders them. His crime spree eventually works against him when two particular widows break his normal routine.

films.title: Limelight
films.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.

films.title: A King in New York
films.overview: A recently-deposed "Estrovian" monarch seeks shelter in New York City, where he becomes an accidental television celebrity. Later, he's wrongly accused of being a Communist and gets caught up in subsequent HUAC hearings.

films.title: The Circus
films.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.

films.title: A Dog's Life
films.overview: The Tramp and his dog companion struggle to survive in the inner city.

films.title: The Immigrant
films.overview: A European immigrant endures a challenging voyage only to get into trouble as soon as he arrives in New York.
